description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image and a global before_script that runs `mkdir -p $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME`, `ln -svf $CI_PROJECT_DIR/* $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME` and `cd $GOPATH/src/$REPO_NAME`. In the validate stage add a format job that executes `go fmt ./...`, a test job that runs `go test -race ./...` with a postgres:latest service, and a vet job that runs `go vet ./...`. In the build stage add a compile job that runs `GOOS=linux CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/seneferu` and publishes all files as untracked artifacts, and a compile-js job that uses the node:9.2.0 image to `cd $CI_PROJECT_DIR`, `npm install` and `npm run build` and stores the `js/` directory as an artifact. In the release stage add a release-image job that runs only on the master branch, uses the docker:git image with a docker:dind service, depends on compile and compile-js, logs in to `registry.gitlab.com` with `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com`, then builds `docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/sorenmat/seneferu:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME .` and pushes it with `docker push registry.gitlab.com/sorenmat/seneferu:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME`. Define variables CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_HOST and REPO_NAME as specified.
